seoTitle: Torrens vs Uriarra Village — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest

ogTitle: Torrens vs Uriarra Village: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Torrens and Uriarra Village.
heading: Torrens vs Uriarra Village — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Torrens, Australian Capital Territory and Uriarra Village, Australian Capital Territory. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Uriarra Village has a lower overall climate risk score (38/100) compared to Torrens (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Torrens or Uriarra Village safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Torrens has a flood risk score of 42/100, while Uriarra Village scores 34/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Torrens scores 53/100 for bushfire risk. Uriarra Village scores 44/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Torrens or Uriarra Village?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Uriarra Village has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.43% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
